paragraphs: ∆êdenam krataa bi so no, obiara betumi de ns…õmmisa a …õfa kwan a obi betumi afa so anya bi ak…îma IATF no. S…õ kuw no betumi afa saa as…õmmisa no so a, wobue baguam GitHub korabea ma adwuma no.

paragraphs: Nhyehy…õe, akuw, anaa ankorankoro betumi de adesr…õde a egyina ahiade ankasa a …õfa kwan a obi betumi afa so anya bi so adi dwuma.
Wob…õtumi afi ase w…î w…õbsaet no so, anaa fa e-mail k…îma contact@iatf.cc, anaa denam akyinnyegye so.
